Precondition: end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping green_box.
Postcondition: green_box is released by end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

Precondition: green_box is accessible and not grasped by end_effector_left and end_effector_right.
Postcondition: green_box is grasped by end_effector_left and end_effector_right.
